response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with directly relevant AI-native experience: the current Staff role at re:cinq centers on agentic workflows, MCP code generators, and developer tooling, which matches the role's baseline mindset. There is genuine high-throughput/distributed-systems exposure (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby) and a clear craftsmanship/TDD culture. However, the language fit is inverted relative to the requirement: the role wants strong Python with working TypeScript, while the candidate is strong in TypeScript/Node and lists no Python at all. Distributed-systems depth is also somewhat dated (2018–2020), and there is little explicit evidence of technical-strategy ownership or driving decisions at scale. Worth an interview to probe Python ability and recent distributed-systems depth.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP/agentic tooling work
Real high-throughput, distributed micro-services experience (millions req/sec)
Broad full-stack range with strong TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship background
concerns: No Python listed despite it being a must-have strong skill
Distributed-systems depth is most prominent in 2018–2020 roles, less recent
Limited explicit evidence of technical strategy or driving decisions at scale
